title: Realistic Horse Genetics - Get In The Bucket Compat
description: Allows for easier identification of the genetic horses you have stored in buckets
body:
This resourcepack will only work with Realistic Horse Genetics and Get In The Bucket. You will also need a mod that allows CIT, we recommend the CIT Reforged mod!

When installed, this resourcepack visually shows which RHG animal is in the bucket, as well as their gender. Allows for easier identification of the animals you have stored!
